metadata.title: Video to Prompt Generator - Turn Reference Video Into Prompt Package
metadata.description: Upload a reference video and generate a structured prompt package with scene summary, master prompt, negative prompt, keywords, and shot list.

page.title: Video to Prompt Generator
page.description: Turn one reference clip into a reusable prompt package for AI video generation, reenactment planning, and prompt libraries.

generator.title: Prompt Package Generator
generator.description: Upload one video and receive a structured prompt package you can copy into your workflow.
